OrderDetail.Description: DO PAY A FINE OF <£ FINE> FOR THE OFFENCES AND THE SUM OF <£ COSTS> FOR COSTS, AMOUNTING TOGETHER TO THE SUM OF <£ TOTAL> AND DO PAY THAT SUM INTO THE OFFICE OF THIS COURT FORTHWITH [ OR BY INSTALMENTS OF <£ INSTAL_AMOUNT> FOR EVERY <INSTAL_PERIOD>, THE FIRST INSTALMENT TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE <FIRST_INSTAL_DATE>.
SHALL BE COMMITTED TO PRISON FOR <COMMITAL_PERIOD>
